name: NeonRoll
description: Neon roll through the universe that is broken. Survive the fluctuating time fabric and build your long roll run! Unlock Ball colors! Unlock Ball Patterns! Unlock Trails!! Roll like a neon!
instructions: larr rarr A D STEER LEFT RIGHT uarr darr W S STEER UP DOWN MOUSE AIM TO STEER DODGE ALL OBSTACLES middot SURVIVE LONGER TOUCH TUNNEL WALLS TO GROW THE BALL E CLICK mdash DASH charge by crossing obstacles ESC P mdash PAUSE
